NO APPEARANCE. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 14, 2008 TO BE HEARD IN CONJUNCTION WITH DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. GIVEN THAT AN AWARD OF FEES IS MANDATORY, IT IS ONLY PRUDENT TO FIX THE AMOUNT WHEN THIS MATTER IS FINALLY DETERMINED IN THE TRIAL COURT. THE COURT, ON ITS' OWN MOTION, IS CONTINUING THE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FROM FEBRUARY 13, 2008 TO FEBRUARY 14, 2008. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ANGELO ORTEGA NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ITS ORDER GRANTING PLTF'S ANTI-SLAPP MOTION ADVANCED FROM FEB-14-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT FEB-07-2008 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER EX PARTE ORDER OF 2/05/08.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHELLE MORALES' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS FOLLOWING ORDER (C.C.P. SECTION 425.16). ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. COUNSEL'S HOURLY RATES ARE SUPPORTED BY THE RECORD AS IS THE ENHANCEMENT OF 1.2 FOR THE WORK DONE ON THE MOTION, NOT FOR FEES. THE COURT HAS REDUCED PLAINTIFFS' HOURS BY TEN PER CENT IN CONNECTION WITH THE MOTION AND HAS INCLUDED THE TIME SPENT OPPOSING THE MOTION FOR RELIEF. THE AWARD IS: $39,042 IN CONNECTION WITH THE MOTION AND $9,650 IN CONNECTION WITH THE FEE REQUEST. COURT DENIES PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES ON THE EX PARTE APPLICATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: PATRICIA ABALOS, CSR #13128

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANGELO ORTEGA'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ITS ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S ANTI-SLAPP MOTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THIS IS A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION AND IT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH C.C.P. SECTION 1008. RELIEF MAY NOT BE GRANTED UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 473(B). THERE HAS BEEN NO SHOWING AS TO WHY THE MCBRIDE DECLARATION WAS NOT OBTAINED IN CONNECTION WITH DEFENDANT'S INITIAL OPPOSITION. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: OBJECTIONS 1, 2 AND 3 ARE SUSTAINED. OBJECTION 4 IS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO SEE COMMISSIONER BORICK TO SET UP A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: PATRICIA ABALOS, CSR #13128

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Itsorder Granting Pltf'S Anti-Slapp Motion;
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANGELO ORTEGA'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM ITS ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S ANTI-SLAPP MOTION.
APPEARANCES: TIMOTHY D. MCMAHON, ESQUIRE (CORSIGLIA MCMAHON & ALLARD, 408.289.1417) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARK L. MOSLEY, ESQUIRE (MOSCONE EMBLIDGE & QUADRA, 415.992.4342) APPEARING FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANGELO ORTEGA.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THIS IS A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION AND IT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH C.C.P. SECTION 1008. RELIEF MAY NOT BE GRANTED UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 473(B). THERE HAS BEEN NO SHOWING AS TO WHY THE MCBRIDE DECLARATION WAS NOT OBTAINED IN CONNECTION WITH DEFENDANT'S INITIAL OPPOSITION. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: OBJECTIONS 1, 2 AND 3 ARE SUSTAINED. OBJECTION 4 IS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO SEE COMMISSIONER BORICK TO SET UP A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: PATRICIA ABALOS, CSR 13128

(Re-Notice) Of Hearing On X-Deft Michelle Morales' Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs Following Order (Ccp 425.16)
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MICHELLE MORALES' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS FOLLOWING ORDER (C.C.P. SECTION 425.16).
APPEARANCES: TIMOTHY D. MCMAHON, ESQUIRE (CORSIGLIA MCMAHON & ALLARD, 408.289.1417) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARK L. MOSLEY, ESQUIRE (MOSCONE EMBLIDGE & QUADRA, 415.992.4342) APPEARING FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANGELO ORTEGA.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. COUNSEL'S HOURLY RATES ARE SUPPORTED BY THE RECORD AS IS THE ENHANCEMENT OF 1.2 FOR THE WORK DONE ON THE MOTION, NOT FOR FEES. THE COURT HAS REDUCED PLAINTIFFS' HOURS BY TEN PER CENT IN CONNECTION WITH THE MOTION AND HAS INCLUDED THE TIME SPENT OPPOSING THE MOTION FOR RELIEF. THE AWARD IS: $39,042 IN CONNECTION WITH THE MOTION AND $9,650 IN CONNECTION WITH THE FEE REQUEST. COURT DENIES PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES ON THE EX PARTE APPLICATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: PATRICIA ABALOS, CSR 13128

(Re-Notice) Of Hearing On X-Deft Michelle Morales' Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs Following Order (Ccp 425.16)
Off Calendar Feb-01-2008 Continued To Feb-14-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MICHELLE MORALES'(RE-NOTICE) CROSS-DEFENDANT MICHELLE MORALES' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS FOLLOWING ORDER (C.C.P. SECTION 425.16).
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 14, 2008 TO BE HEARD IN CONJUNCTION WITH DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. GIVEN THAT AN AWARD OF FEES IS MANDATORY, IT IS ONLY PRUDENT TO FIX THE AMOUNT WHEN THIS MATTER IS FINALLY DETERMINED IN THE TRIAL COURT. THE COURT, ON ITS' OWN MOTION, IS CONTINUING THE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FROM FEBRUARY 13, 2008 TO FEBRUARY 14, 2008. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CLUB ONE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS.
APPEARANCES: TIMOTHY D. McMAHON, ESQUIRE (408.298.7200) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MARK MOSLEY, ESQUIRE (MOSLEY & GEARINGER, 415.440.3176) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED, VICTORIA V SUPERIOR COURT IS PERSUASIVE AUTHORITY. IN ADDITION, IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSENTED TO THE PROVISION. THE PROVISION IS NOT HIGHLIGHTED, THE BOX FOR PLAINTIFF'S INITIALS ON PAGE TWO IS BLANK AND THE RULES OF THE AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION ARE NOT DISCLOSED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/JU) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
